scripts.dev:insecure: open -a 'Google Chrome' --args --disable-web-security --user-data-dir=/tmp/chrome-dev-solax http://localhost:8080 & python3 -m http.server 8080 -d web
scripts.build:android: sh stamp-build.sh && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:ios: sh stamp-build.sh && npx cap sync ios && cd ios && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphoneos build CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY=- AD_HOC_CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=YES
